name: MoneyGram
description_short: San Carlos, CA MoneyGram at 1324 San Carlos Ave offers check cashing and money transfer services with extended hours daily.
description_long:
Located at 1324 San Carlos Ave in San Carlos, CA, this MoneyGram branch operates as a standalone check-cashing store. The location is open Monday through Saturday from 7:00 AM to midnight, with Sunday hours extending from 8:00 AM to midnight, making it convenient for San Carlos residents to access financial services during extended operating times.

This San Carlos MoneyGram location provides essential check-cashing services and money transfer options for local customers. For service inquiries, specific details about fees, transaction limits, or to discuss your financial needs, customers can call +1 800-746-7287.

If you need quick check cashing or to send money in San Carlos, bring a valid ID and your checks or account information. MoneyGram offers reliable, accessible financial solutions for local residents.
address: 1324 San Carlos Ave, San Carlos, CA 94070

company_info.headquarters: 1324 San Carlos Ave, San Carlos, CA 94070

pros: Extensive retail location network including accessible partner sites like CVS/Longs pharmacies
Both online and offline transaction capabilities for money transfers
Domestic and international money transfer options
Multiple service types available at single locations including checks, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payments
Searchable location finder tool with real-time hours and address information
Services available during extended retail hours (example location open until 11:59 PM)
cons: No physical branded locations; entirely dependent on third-party retail partners
Limited to services offered through partner agreements; cannot guarantee availability of all services at every location
Typical money transfer fees apply, making services more expensive than traditional banking for frequent users
No deposit accounts, savings products, or credit facilities offered
Service availability restricted to partner location operating hours
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking
Individuals needing occasional money transfers or check cashing services
Customers requiring in-person financial transactions at convenient retail locations
Those sending or receiving international remittances through established networks
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those needing occasional check cashing or money transfer services without traditional bank accounts. The primary caveat is that service quality and availability depend on partner location participation and hours, and transaction costs are substantially higher than traditional banking alternatives.
services: Agent location services through retail partnerships
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1324 San Carlos Ave, San Carlos, CA. Check cashing and money transfers with extended hours.
